chapter_title.en: Chapter 19 – Wiping the head and the two feet

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/102)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/102)
text: قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) الْمَرْأَةُ يُجْزِئُهَا مِنْ مَسْحِ الرَّأْسِ أَنْ تَمْسَحَ مُقَدَّمَهُ قَدْرَ ثَلَاثِ أَصَابِعَ وَ لَا تُلْقِيَ عَنْهَا خِمَارَهَا .

en.hubeali: Ali, from his father, form Hammad, from Hareyz, from zurara who said,

‘Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The woman, it would suffice her from the wiping of the head that she wipes its front by a measurement of three fingers, and she should not cast off her scarf from her’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ali has narrated from his father from Hammad from Hariz from Zurarah who has said the following: “Abu Ja’far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘In the case of women it is sufficient for them to wipe the front portion of their head the size of three fingers without removing their head scarf.’”
